metadata.description: Documents all URL substitutions and failed fetches during Phase 1 source ingestion

fallbacks.reason: 404 client error — URL does not exist on EEOC website
fallbacks.notes: The substitute URL is the EEOC's definitive Q&A on the ADAAA final rule, which is the post-ADAAA FAQ equivalent and arguably a stronger source than the original target.

fallbacks.reason: 404 client error — URL does not exist on EEOC website
fallbacks.substitute_status: CONTENT COVERED — ADAAA implementing regulations are codified at 29 CFR Part 1630, already fetched as Source 03 (primary). Federal Register original (76 FR 16978, Mar. 25, 2011) not fetched separately.
fallbacks.notes: Cornell LII serves the current, post-amendment CFR text. Source 03 already contains all ADAAA regulatory content. No content gap.

fallbacks.reason: URL redirected to EEOC Youth page (https://www.eeoc.gov/youth/disability-discrimination-01) — not the intended guidance document. Fallback attempt to https://www.eeoc.gov/eeoc-disability-related-resources returned navigation page only, no substantive text.
fallbacks.substitute_status: COVERED BY OTHER SOURCES — no gap in vocabulary or module content
fallbacks.notes: The EEOC has reorganized its website. The disability discrimination topic-level page now appears to be at https://www.eeoc.gov/eeoc-disability-related-resources but serves as a resource index, not substantive guidance. Operative content (what constitutes disability discrimination, harassment, retaliation) is fully covered by other fetched sources.
